enum  vtid_t {
  VTID_INVALID , VTID_FLOAT , VTID_DOUBLE , VTID_UINT32 ,
  VTID_INT32 , VTID_UINT64 , VTID_INT64 , VTID_BOOL ,

}

Functions

static void value_print (const value_t *value, int(*print_func)(const char *,...))
 Print a value_t to an output using the provided print function.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Defines the type-identifier enumeration vtid_t, the variant union vtype_t, and the tagged value value_t used throughout the API to represent heterogeneous control and property values.

Function Documentation

◆ value_print()

static void value_print ( const value_t * value,
int(* print_func )(const char *,...) )
inlinestatic

Formats and prints the variant value according to its type identifier.

Parameters
[in]valuePointer to the value to print.
[in]print_funcPrintf-like callback used for output.
Generated by  1.12.0
